company_name: Blue Wave Pool Service And Supplies, Inc.

hero.headline: 42 Years of Pools Done Right
hero.subheadline: Since 1984, Connecticut families have trusted Blue Wave for expert pool service, repairs, and supplies. Our TEC-Driven approach means Trust, Execution, and Convenience — so you spend time swimming, not stressing.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Connecticut's Trusted Pros
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to advanced water treatment systems, Blue Wave has the certified technicians, retail showroom, and four decades of expertise to keep your pool perfect.

cards.title: Pool Service & Repair
cards.description: Comprehensive in-ground pool service for residential and commercial properties. Weekly maintenance, seasonal openings and closings, and fast equipment repairs — all handled by certified technicians.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Professional pool inspections for buyers, sellers, and property owners. We evaluate equipment, structural condition, and safety compliance so you know exactly what you're getting.

cards.title: Water Testing & Chemistry
cards.description: Free computerized water testing in our Wallingford showroom. Get expert analysis, personalized chemical recommendations, and a treatment plan tailored to your pool's exact needs.

cards.title: Chemicals & Supplies
cards.description: Full retail showroom stocked with premium brands like Orenda, Bio-Dex, Pro Team, and Jack's Magic. Stain treatments, phosphate control, enzymes, and everything your pool needs.

cards.title: Clear Comfort AOP Systems
cards.description: Advanced oxidation technology that reduces chemical use by up to 50% while eliminating 99.99%+ of harmful contaminants. Healthier water for your family with less chlorine.

cards.title: CPO Certification Training
cards.description: Become a Certified Pool Operator through our online or classroom courses. Led by industry expert Brian Diglio, our training prepares facility pros for real-world pool management.

steps.title: Call or Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Reach out by phone, email, or stop by our Wallingford location. We'll discuss your pool's needs and schedule a convenient time for service or a free water test.

steps.title: We Deliver Expert Care
steps.description: Our licensed, certified technicians handle everything — service, repairs, water chemistry, and equipment. We show up on time, every time, with 42 years of know-how behind every visit.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays swim-ready all season long. With our TEC-Driven approach — Trust, Execution, and Convenience — pool ownership becomes the easy, enjoyable experience it should be.

about.label: Why Connecticut Trusts Blue Wave
about.headline: A Family Business Built on 42 Years of Integrity
about.description: Founded in 1984 and led by President Brian Diglio, Blue Wave has grown from a small Hamden operation into Connecticut's go-to pool service authority. Now based in Wallingford, we've earned our reputation the old-fashioned way — through customer satisfaction and word-of-mouth referrals. Every technician is certified, every visit is thorough, and every customer is treated like family.

features.title: Licensed & Multiply Certified
features.description: State service license, HIC registration, builder's license, PHTA-CPI and CWRI certifications. We carry every credential so you never have to worry.

features.title: Full Retail Showroom
features.description: Visit us in Wallingford for free computerized water testing, expert chemical advice, robotic cleaners, and everything you need for perfect pool care.

features.title: NESPA Gold Service Award
features.description: Recognized by the Northeast Spa & Pool Association for outstanding service quality. This award reflects our commitment to doing the job right, every single time.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Contact us for a free, honest quote tailored to your pool's size, condition, and service needs.

guarantee.headline: Our "Water at Its Best" Promise
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — at no extra charge. We've built our reputation on trust and referrals for over 40 years, and we plan to keep it that way. Your satisfaction isn't just a goal; it's our business model.

faqs.question: How quickly can Blue Wave start service on my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new residential clients are scheduled within a few business days. For urgent issues like green pools or equipment failures, call us directly and we'll prioritize getting a technician to you as soon as possible.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools and facilities?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle commercial pool compliance, health department coordination, water quality management, and ongoing maintenance for facilities throughout Connecticut. We also offer CPO certification training for your staff.

faqs.question: What makes your water testing different?
faqs.answer: Our free computerized water testing analyzes your pool or spa water with precision that test strips can't match. You get a detailed printout with exact chemical recommendations and a personalized treatment plan — no guesswork involved.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Blue Wave holds state service, HIC, and builder licenses. Our technicians carry PHTA-CPI and CWRI certifications, and our company has earned the NESPA Gold Service Award for outstanding service quality.

faqs.question: Can I just buy chemicals and supplies without a service contract?
faqs.answer: Of course. Our Wallingford showroom is open to everyone. Stop in for chemicals from brands like Orenda, Bio-Dex, and Jack's Magic, plus robotic cleaners, equipment, and free water testing — no service agreement required.

testimonials.name: Henry S.
testimonials.text: Needed a specific part for my heater and Justin went above and beyond to get me what I needed. They're knowledgeable, helpful, friendly and I would highly recommend them.

testimonials.name: Long-time Customer
testimonials.text: Have used Blue Wave for many years for pool opening/closing and weekly check-ups. They are amazing. Staff is polite and super informative. The owner is a first-class gentleman running a high integrity company.

testimonials.name: CPO Student
testimonials.text: The staff are outstanding — knowledgeable, approachable, and always willing to help. Instructor Brian is gifted in his teaching style for CPO classes.

contact.headline:
Ready for Pool Care You
Can Actually Count On?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from Connecticut's NESPA Gold Award-winning pool pros. 42 years of experience, one phone call away.

footer.description: Family-owned pool service and supplies since 1984. Proudly serving Connecticut for over 42 years.
